name: Teifi Marshes (Cilgerran) Wildlife Reserve
highlights: Otter-haunted marsh and Europe's best place to spot kingfishers on the Teifi.
points_of_interest: Welsh Wildlife Centre; Cilgerran Castle (Cadw) short detour; kingfisher, otter, water buffalo
viewpoints: Mallard viewing tower; Teifi gorge overlook
parking_start: Welsh Wildlife Centre car park (pay & display)
food_drink_nearby: Welsh Wildlife Centre café; Pendre Inn Cilgerran
hazards_notes: Boardwalks can flood at high tides; keep dogs close
